Container.Name: brainLLM
Container.Overview: Self-hosted RAG application for querying a personal document corpus using natural language. Ingests Markdown, PDF and PowerPoint files, embeds them with OpenAI, stores vectors in pgvector, and answers questions via Claude with adjustable inference and evidence depth sliders.
Container.Description: Self-hosted RAG application for querying a personal document corpus using natural language. Ingests Markdown, PDF and PowerPoint files, embeds them with OpenAI, stores vectors in pgvector, and answers questions via Claude with adjustable inference and evidence depth sliders.

Config.Name: API Port
Config.Description: Port for the FastAPI backend. The frontend calls this port from the browser, so it must be accessible on your network.

Config.Name: Documents
Config.Description: Path to your document folder containing Markdown, PDF and PowerPoint files to ingest.

Config.Name: Database Host
Config.Description: Hostname or IP of your pgvector PostgreSQL instance (e.g. 192.168.1.100 or a container name).

Config.Name: Database Name
Config.Description: PostgreSQL database name. Defaults to brainllm.

Config.Name: Anthropic API Key
Config.Description: Your Anthropic API key (starts with sk-ant-). Used for the Claude LLM that answers queries.

Config.Name: OpenAI API Key
Config.Description: Your OpenAI API key (starts with sk-). Used for generating document embeddings.
